MINI MINUTES: JPT Philip Keith; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Michael Winding is present.
Attorney Clinton O'Keefe Killian for the plaintiff.
Defendants Sidney Taylor and Susan Oubre are present.
Attorney Anda Kwong appearing for defendants in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 505A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of JUL-07-2014 is vacated. (501/JPT)
